cases.title: First-time user enters setup mode
cases.expected: User enters first-time setup mode instead of normal job-aware mode.

cases.title: Returning user bypasses setup mode
cases.expected: User bypasses setup mode and enters the normal job-aware path when applicable.

cases.title: Setup mode uses shared resume engine
cases.expected: Setup mode is a mode/state of the shared resume engine, not a separate divergent resume system.

cases.title: Initial profile build does not charge credits
cases.expected: Initial profile setup is free and does not consume credits.

cases.title: Completing setup persists canonical structured resume
cases.expected: A canonical structured resume/profile snapshot is persisted and available for ATS/matching.

cases.title: User routes to Account/Profile after setup
cases.expected: User is routed or prompted toward Account/Profile for optional cleanup after setup.

cases.title: User can continue into Jobs/Match after setup
cases.expected: User can continue into Jobs/Match with the canonical profile available.

cases.title: Job-aware mode uses canonical profile after onboarding
cases.expected: Job-aware mode uses the canonical structured profile created during setup.

cases.title: Tutorial messaging explains base resume vs role tailoring
cases.expected: Messaging clearly explains that the user builds a strong base resume once and tailors per role later.

cases.title: Incomplete onboarding resumes correctly
cases.expected: User can resume setup without being incorrectly marked complete or losing entered/imported state.
